tsc_description: Demonstrates commitment to integrity and ethical values
our_control: Operator code of conduct; founder-aligned reputational stake; auditable git history
Solo-operator scale — no board exists. Compensating control: auditable git history + Stripe receipts as financial substrate.
Single operator at current scale; documented future-state authority matrix when population exceeds one.
Operator self-attests on cryptography competence; structured annual training scheduled at SOC 2 engagement kickoff.

tsc_description: Internal communications support functioning of internal control
our_control: Policy documents in docs/soc2/ are the operator's internal-control communication substrate; reviewed annually.
SECURITY.md disclosure channel + privacy notice at /privacy + status update procedure in incident-response-plan.md.
Solo-operator: not applicable. Decisions are documented in the git history and STATE.md.
Six explicit risk objectives covering customer secrets; prompt confidentiality; audit tamper-evidence; deployment authenticity; availability; vendor scope.

tsc_description: Identifies risks to achievement of objectives
our_control: Top 10 risks identified in risk-assessment.md with honest residual ranking.
Honest assessment of solo-operator separation-of-duties limitation; compensating controls in personnel-security-policy.md §6.

tsc_description: Identifies and assesses changes that could significantly impact internal control
our_control: Change-management-policy.md and the quarterly review cadence on risk-assessment.md ensure changes are surfaced; STATE.md tracks live posture.

tsc_description: Selects and develops control activities for monitoring
our_control: Anomaly detector (shadow mode); hash-chained audit log; cosign verification; public determinism bench.
Incident-response-plan.md §7 lessons-learned cycle; post-mortems update affected policies; SECURITY-NOTICE.md for public-facing changes.

tsc_description: Selects and develops control activities to mitigate risks
our_control: Each row in risk-assessment.md has a Mitigation column with current controls.

tsc_description: Selects and develops general control activities over technology
our_control: Distroless image; strict CSP + security headers; signed images; hash-chained audit; ed25519 + bearer auth.

tsc_description: Deploys control activities through policies and procedures
our_control: The docs/soc2/ policies + the source-tree implementation are the procedure substrate; deploy script enforces the technical procedures.
Customer auth (bearer + ed25519); admin auth (X-Admin-Key constant-time compare); service auth (Container Apps internal ingress).
Customer registration via Stripe Checkout; operator registration is a closed manual ceremony.
Key revocation immediate via POST /admin/keys/:id/revoke; ADMIN_KEY rotation via Key Vault + revision update; auto-revoke on Stripe subscription deletion.
Azure platform-level — covered by Microsoft Azure SOC 2 report.

tsc_description: Discontinues logical and physical access on no longer required basis
our_control: Off-boarding procedure documented; auto-revoke on subscription deletion; immediate logical revoke via admin endpoint.

tsc_description: Implements logical access security measures to protect against threats from outside the system boundary
our_control: TLS everywhere; HSTS preload; constant-time admin compare; honeypot for scanner traffic; ed25519 replay-window; anomaly detector observation.

tsc_description: Restricts the transmission/movement of information to authorized internal/external users
our_control: Tenant-scoped audit query; admin-key gated admin endpoints; cosign pub key publicly fetchable but private key in KV.

tsc_description: Implements controls to prevent and detect unauthorized software
our_control: Distroless runtime (no shell to install software); cosign-signed images; ACR immutable tags.
SECURITY.md disclosure channel; anomaly detector signals; cosign-verify customer-side; per-tenant chain_ok check.
Four anomaly signal types (auth brute force / scanner / schema spike / latency drift); audit-chain break detection.
Incident-response-plan.md §6 containment + eradication procedure; 72h ack SLA; 30d fix-in-main for High/Critical.

tsc_description: Implements activities to recover from identified security incidents
our_control: Rollback procedure in scripts/deploy-update.sh; customer notification per incident-response-plan.md §6.4; SECURITY-NOTICE.md publication.

tsc_description: Identifies/develops/implements controls related to security incident response improvement
our_control: Lessons-learned cycle in incident-response-plan.md §7; post-mortem-driven policy updates.
scripts/deploy-update.sh is the only authorized production path; manual TTY gate; full jest suite must pass; cosign signs on deploy.

tsc_description: Identifies/selects/develops risk mitigation activities for business disruptions
our_control: Business continuity plan documents rollback / restart / recovery procedures for each failure class.

tsc_description: Assesses and manages risks associated with vendors and business partners
our_control: Vendor-management-policy.md lists Azure / Stripe / GitHub with data shared; SOC 2 / ISO references; annual review cadence; off-boarding plan.
Operator monitors Container App scaling metrics; capacity adequate at current customer scale. Multi-region failover roadmap captures growth path.
Azure platform-level (covered by Microsoft Azure SOC 2 report). Rollback procedure in deploy script.
Each failure class in business-continuity-plan.md §3 has detection / containment / procedure / target time-to-recover.
Data classification table with retention/storage/crypto-at-rest per class; explicit never-store-content invariant on customer prompts and responses.
Logical-delete on key revocation; subscription off-boarding flow; manual hard-delete process for DSAR.
Schema-enforced decoding constrains output shape at the token level; determinism claim verifiable via open bench.
Express JSON parser limit 512kb; raw-body preservation for ed25519 signature verification; honeypot rejects scanner-target paths early.
Per-call request ID; HMAC-signed responses; per-tenant audit row appended on every call.
X-Cogos-Signature HMAC over response body; X-Cogos-Schema-Enforced header indicates grammar-constrained vs not.
Audit log hash-chained per tenant; mode 0600 files; Azure-managed-disk encryption at the platform layer.

tsc_description: Provides notice about its privacy practices
our_control: Public privacy notice at /privacy; sub-processor list maintained in vendor-management-policy.md.
Customer data collection limited to billing metadata + auth + usage metadata; prompts never persisted.

tsc_description: Communicates choices available to data subjects
our_control: Right-to-access / right-to-deletion / right-to-rectification routed via support@5ceos.com per privacy notice.
Customer subscription = consent to terms (Stripe Checkout flow); customer-as-controller framing for prompt content.
Operator-as-processor posture documented; customer is controller for prompt content.
Collected data limited to email/billing/usage metadata; prompts never persisted.
Customer email used only for transactional billing comms + incident notifications.
Audit-log retention currently indefinite; explicit 12-month target on the roadmap; key records retained for binding past usage events.
Per-tenant /v1/audit endpoint returns the tenant's own audit slice; manual DSAR process for billing data.
Manual DSAR process; rectification requests routed to operator within 30-day SLA.

tsc_description: Discloses personal information to third parties only with authorization
our_control: Stripe (billing) / Azure (substrate) / GitHub (source) are the only sub-processors; explicitly enumerated in vendor-management-policy.md.
Customer email collected at Stripe checkout; customer can update via Stripe Customer Portal.

tsc_description: Monitoring and enforcement of privacy posture
our_control: Privacy posture reviewed annually per data-classification-policy.md §7; incidents trigger immediate review.
